title: World of Tanks crew sounds
description: Enhance your Minecraft experience with a resource pack that replaces combat in-game sounds with immersive World of Tanks crew voice lines and other unique effects.
body:
**WoT crew sounds** is a Minecraft resource pack that replaces various in-game sounds with **authentic World of Tanks crew voiceovers** and other unique audio effects. Whether you're engaging in combat, taking damage, or leveling up, these new sounds will make your gameplay more exciting and immersive.

📢 **Preview:** [Watch the demonstration](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z5UG4m1O8oM)  

## 🔊 Features:  
✔️ **Custom Player Death Sound** – Unique voiceovers upon death  
✔️ **Custom Fall Sound** – Realistic impact effects  
✔️ **Custom Critical Hit Sound** – Satisfying feedback for landing critical hits  
✔️ **Custom Strong Hit Sound** – Distinct audio cue for powerful strikes  
✔️ **Custom Sweep Attack Sound** – Enhanced sword sweep sound  
✔️ **Custom Freeze Hurt Sound** – Unique sound effect for freezing damage  
✔️ **Custom Drowning Sound** – Realistic struggle effects when drowning  
✔️ **Custom Shield Sound** – Impact sounds when blocking attacks  
✔️ **Custom Wither Sound** – Unique audio for wither-related events  
✔️ **Custom Level Up Sound** – Rewarding notification for gaining experience  

## 🎮 Why Download?  
If you're a fan of World of Tanks or simply looking for a fresh take on Minecraft's sound design, this pack is perfect for you. Elevate your gameplay with immersive combat sounds and high-quality voiceovers, making every battle more intense and every adventure more engaging.  

## 🚀 Installation:  
1. Download the resource pack.  
2. Place it in your resourcepacks folder.  
3. Enable it in Minecraft’s settings.  
4. Enjoy your new WoT-inspired audio experience!
